title: Statement from UC Academic Senate on admissions review
snippet: The Academic Senate is not rescinding its commitment to a comprehensive review of standardized testing in admissions. Recognizing the significance of this issue, the Academic Senate is revising its timeline while ensuring the forthcoming review is thorough, evidence-based and informed by faculty expertise.
match_reason: websearch (position_statement) — Ahmet Palazoglu, as UC Academic Senate Chair, issued this official statement regarding the admissions review, which is tasked with addressing the widespread adoption of AI and its impact on college readiness.

title: Endorsement of 'Inventing ELIZA: How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI'
snippet: Part software archaeology, part improv, Inventing ELIZA opens a backstage chat in which the recovered MAD-SLIP source code acts as a lively conversational partner, transforming a technological artifact fundamental to the history of AI into a compelling dialogue about conversations themselves.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — Rita Raley, Professor of English at UC Santa Barbara, provided this official book endorsement for the MIT Press publication.

title: SeedSmith: LLM-Driven Seed Synthesis for Directed Fuzzing
snippet: The research introduces SeedSmith, an AI-driven framework designed to optimize directed fuzzing by synthesizing high-quality initial inputs. Traditional directed fuzzers often struggle to reach specific code locations, or sinks, due to inaccurate mapping of indirect function calls.
match_reason: social (video) — Giovanni Vigna is a co-author of the research presented in this video, representing his primary affiliation at UC Santa Barbara.
